'''Yamnoss''' was a [[H'nemthe (species)/Legends|H'nemthe]] patron at [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[M'iiyoom Onith/Legends|M'iiyoom Onith]] was originally going to be named Yamnoss as a pun on "Yam Nose", her production nickname.

This character did not appear in the final cut of ''[[The Star Wars Holiday Special]]''. The official Star Wars website established Yamnoss as an official name for this H'nemthe.
